posts.author: TKingSH (Tami King)
posts.cookedHtml:
I need/would like the ability to view either the timeline or gantt or both by sprints,

Additional reqs for this request:

  • have the background of the sprints alternately greyed out
    • sprint one - white background
    • sprint two - grey background
    • sprint three - white background
    • etc.
